mapper.sql: user_id, email, nickname, password_hash, profile_image, provider, provider_id, user_role, required_term, option_term, marketing_agreed, status, suspended_at, suspended_until, suspend_reason, is_deleted, deleted_at, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE last_login_at IS NOT NULL AND last_login_at > #{after}
SELECT FROM users WHERE is_deleted = false AND created_at BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE last_login_at IS NULL OR last_login_at < #{before}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_id, email, nickname, password_hash, profile_image, provider, provider_id, user_role, required_term, option_term, marketing_agreed, status, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{passwordHash}, #{profileImage}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, #{userRole}, #{requiredTerm}, #{optionTerm}, #{marketingAgreed}, #{status}, #{isDeleted}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, profile_image = #{profileImage}, user_role = #{userRole}, status = #{status}, suspended_at = #{suspendedAt}, suspended_until = #{suspendedUntil}, suspend_reason = #{suspendReason}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false

UPDATE users SET is_deleted = false, deleted_at = NULL, status = 'ACTIVE', suspended_at = NULL, suspended_until = NULL, suspend_reason = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = true
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = #{email} AND provider = 'LOCAL'
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, suspended_at = #{suspendedAt}, suspended_until = #{suspendedUntil}, suspend_reason = #{suspendReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
